TestCase.name: testOrderByWithGlobalAggregate
TestCase.Resource: LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[$0]) +- LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[MAX($0)]) +- LogicalSort(sort0=[$1], dir0=[ASC]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])

HashAggregate(isMerge=[false], select=[MAX(a) AS EXPR$0]) +- Sort(orderBy=[b ASC]) +- Exchange(distribution=[single]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b])
